creator: alexbestms@wwu.de
text:
the link to http://snapshots.us.freebsd.org/ on http://www.freebsd.org/snapshots/ is broken.

it might be a good idea to add a reference to http://www.allbsd.org/ instead. they've been building freebsd images for a few years now on a daily basis and have almost zero downtime.

cheers.
alex
